disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sore throat was preceded by 48 hours of coryzal symptoms — runny nose, cough and watery irritated eyes
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and how did it begin?
Do you have any other symptoms like a cold, cough or runny nose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started like a normal cold two days ago — runny nose, a cough and my eyes were watery and irritated — and then the throat got really bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe throat pain has stopped all oral fluid intake for about 12 hours, with light-headedness and weakness
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to drink fluids?
How much have you had to drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain is so bad I haven't been able to drink anything all day, and now I feel weak and a bit light-headed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty opening the mouth, no drooling, no voice change and no unilateral throat swelling
trigger_question_examples: Can you open your mouth fully?
Are you drooling or does your voice sound muffled?
Is one side of your throat more swollen than the other?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can open my mouth okay, I'm not drooling, my voice sounds normal to me, and it doesn't feel worse on one side.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I hadn't really thought about that — let me check... no, none of that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathing is comfortable — no noisy breathing, no difficulty getting air in
trigger_question_examples: Is your breathing noisy or hard?
Do you feel like your throat is closing when you breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing is fine — it's just swallowing that's the problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not taken any pain relief because of fear of swallowing tablets
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
What have you tried so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't taken anything — I've been too scared to swallow pills when it hurts this much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels feverish with generalised fatigue but a home thermometer reads only low-grade (37.8)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel hot or feverish?
Have you been able to check your temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel feverish and really tired; when I checked, my thermometer said 37.8.
